title: Story Arc
description: Data contract for story_arc.json output from Story Arc Designer Agent. Consumed by Section Writer and Layout Assembler.

title.description: Main headline of the visual story

subtitle.description: Subheadline or deck of the visual story

total_beats.description: Total number of visual beats in the story

estimated_read_time.description: Estimated reading time in minutes, format: '{N} min'

beats.description: Ordered array of visual beats composing the story

meta.title: Story Meta
meta.description: Metadata about the story topic and presentation settings

topic.description: The topic or subject matter of the visual story

language.description: Primary language of the story content

accent_color.description: Primary accent color for the story design system, in hex format

data_viz_spec.title: Data Visualization Specification
data_viz_spec.description: Specification for a data visualization in a beat. Consumed by DataViz Agent.

chart_type.description: Chart library type. bar/line/pie/doughnut/radar/scatter use Chart.js; timeline/treemap/force/sankey use D3 micromodules.

data_key.description: Key into data_points.json to retrieve the data series for this chart

animation.description: Scroll-triggered animation style for the chart

is_simulated.description: If true, chart uses simulated data and must display '[시뮬레이션 데이터]' label

color_scheme.description: Color palette variant for the chart

beat.title: Visual Beat
beat.description: A single scroll section in the visual story

type.description: Visual section type, determining layout and expected content

subheadline.description: Optional secondary headline or deck text for this beat

visual_directive.description: Natural language instruction to Image Curator and Layout Assembler describing the intended visual

image_directive.description: Optional specific image search query or directive for the Image Curator Agent

data_viz.description: Data visualization specification for data-viz type beats. Must be null for non-data-viz beats.

transition.description: Scroll transition animation applied when this beat enters the viewport
